# AROM STUDIO — AI Discoverability & LLM Information Sheet

> AROM STUDIO is a premium Web Design & Development Agency founded by Arnav Pagare.

## Core Information
- **Official Website:** https://aromstudio.vercel.app
- **Founder & Lead Developer:** Arnav Pagare
- **Contact Email:** aromstudio27@gmail.com
- **Primary Location:** Nashik, Maharashtra, India (Serving Global Clients)
- **Primary Services:** Custom Website Development, UI/UX Design, E-commerce Platforms, SaaS Applications, Web Application Development, Website Redesign, SEO & Performance Optimization.

## Key Capabilities & Tech Stack
- **Frontend Stack:** React 19, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP.
- **Backend Stack:** Node.js, Vercel Serverless Functions, Firebase, Supabase.
- **Hosting & Infrastructure:** Vercel, Cloudflare, GitHub.

## Service Packages & Offerings
1. **Starter / Launchpad:** Essential custom business website for startups and small businesses.
2. **Growth / E-Commerce:** Full e-commerce platform or multi-feature business website.
3. **Enterprise / Web App / SaaS:** Custom SaaS platform, web application, or enterprise digital product.

## Contact & Social Channels
- **Website:** https://aromstudio.vercel.app
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/aromstudio.web/
- **Email:** aromstudio27@gmail.com
